# services.saslauthd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.saslauthd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.saslauthd.config` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Configuration to use for Cyrus SASL authentication daemon. |
| `services.saslauthd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable saslauthd, the Cyrus SASL authentication daemon. |
| `services.saslauthd.mechanism` | `string` | Auth mechanism to use |
| `services.saslauthd.package` | `package` | The bin package to use. |
